title: Brough Memorial Church
tagline: Brough Memorial Church — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Brough Memorial Church or CSI Brough Memorial Church is a CSI church situated in Erode of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India.
overview.description: Brough Memorial Church or CSI Brough Memorial Church is a CSI church situated in Erode of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. This church was built and consecrated in the year 1930 by Rev. Antony Watson Brough, a missionary from South Wales in Australia.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Abdul Gani Textile Market
topPlaces.description: Abdul Gani Textile Market locally called as Gani Market, is one of the wholesale and retail textile markets located in the city of Erode in Tamil Nadu, India. It is owned, operated and maintained by Erode City Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Perumpallam Canal
topPlaces.description: Perumpallam Canal is an irrigation canal in the city of Erode in Tamil Nadu. The canal traverses from west to east across the city and flows into River Kaveri.

topPlaces.name: Erode
topPlaces.description: Erode (Tamil: [iːɾoːɽɯ]; īrōṭu), is a city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located on the banks of the Kaveri river and is surrounded by the Western Ghats.

topPlaces.name: Central Bus Station, Erode
topPlaces.description: Erode Central Bus Stand or Independence day Silver Jubilee Central Bus Terminus is a major terminal bus station located in the City of Erode, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located near Swastik Circle at the junction of Mettur Road and Sathy Road about 3 km north of Erode Junction Railway Station.

topPlaces.name: VOC Park Stadium
topPlaces.description: The V.O.Chidambaram Park Stadium or VOC Park SDAT Stadium, primarily a football venue, is a multipurpose sports complex in the South Indian city of Erode, Tamil Nadu. It is located inside the SDAT District Sports Complex near VOC Park.

topPlaces.name: Erode division
topPlaces.description: Erode division is one of the two revenue divisions in Erode district of Tamil Nadu, India. The revenue division includes 4 taluks.

topPlaces.name: Electric Loco Shed, Erode
topPlaces.description: Electric Loco Shed, Erode is one of the premiere engine sheds located in Erode in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located along the Jolarpettai–Coimbatore line, about 1 km to the east of Erode Junction, under the administrative control of Salem railway division of Southern Railway zone.

topPlaces.name: Erode taluk
topPlaces.description: Erode taluk is a taluk of Erode district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Erode.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Brough Memorial Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Brough Memorial Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Brough Memorial Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (82 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (91 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Brough Memorial Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Brough Memorial Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Brough Memorial Church?
faq.a: Stays in Brough Memorial Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Brough Memorial Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Abdul Gani Textile Market, Perumpallam Canal, Erode, Central Bus Station, Erode, VOC Park Stadium.
